headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -59.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 150% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 125 quotes including 98 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 72.7 sits in the middle of its typical range but represents a significant jump from yesterday's 25.8.

• Fears dropped notably from yesterday while optimism recovered somewhat but remains in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
